IDF: Earlier today (Wednesday), IDF troops identified two vehicles in southern Lebanon that had departed from a military structure used by Hezbollah. The terrorists in the vehicles crossed the Forward Defense Line and approached the troops in a manner that posed an immediate threat to their safety.

After identifying the individuals as violating the ceasefire understandings and posing an imminent threat, the Israeli Air Force struck one of the vehicles. Subsequently, the structure from which the individuals had fled was also struck.

Reports were received that two journalists were injured as a result of the strikes. The IDF is not preventing rescue teams from reaching the area. The details of the incident are under review.

It should be noted that the map of the Forward Defense Line has been published and the area has been evacuated.

The IDF does not target journalists and acts to mitigate harm to them while maintaining the safety and security of its troops.

Daily US-Israel-Iran War Brief: 
22nd April 2026  

- We will be posting daily war updates on the ongoing war in Middle East 
- ⁠Follow us for daily Brief.  

● Trump announced an indefinite extension of the ceasefire, citing the need for a unified proposal from Iran.

● IRGC forces fired on commercial vessels in/near the Strait of Hormuz due to maritime violations.

● Two vessels (Epaminondas and MSC Francesca) were seized and taken to Iranian waters; a third vessel (Euphoria) was damaged.

● Hezbollah launched a hostile aircraft toward IDF soldiers operating south of the Forward Defense Line, in the area of southern Lebanon.

● The IDF eliminated Khamis Muhammad Khamis Qassas, who infiltrated Kibbutz Nir Oz during the Oct. 7 Massacre. He recently led terrorists to the Yellow Line area.

● Iran has not issued any official statement confirming its agreement to extend the ceasefire, despite unverified reports circulating in some media outlets.

● The IDF carried out a targeted strike in the Saluki stream area, eliminating two Hezbollah militants who allegedly crossed the security strip and approached Israeli forces.

● Iran's ambassador Amir Saeid Iravani urged the Security Council to compel the US to release the vessel TOUSKA, its crew, their families and all affected persons without condition.

END IF THE BRIEF

tweets.title:
RT by @OsintTV: *Army Officer Awarded Compensation for Illegal Toll Charge* 

HC enforces the law and the rights of Armed Forces

In a significant judgment reinforcing the rights of defence personnel, the High  Court,Jaipur  has ruled in favor of myself when I  was unlawfully charged at a toll plaza despite being exempt under Government of India rules.

This case happened  wen I was travelling from jhunjhunu to jaipur alongwith my family! I was  compelled to pay toll charges in violation of established exemption norms applicable to serving Army personnel despite showing the I CARD ! I came to know that at this Toll plaza many of our serving soldiers been forced to pay Tolls ,hence, instead of arguing wid these Goons i decided to collect the proofs & filed a case at Jaipur High Court!The matter highlighted serious lapses in compliance by the toll operator and the inconvenience caused to the serving Soldiers!

After examining the facts and submissions, the Hon’ble Court held the toll collection was illegal and unjustified. *Accordingly, with good wishes of u all,the Court directed the concerned party to pay compensation of ₹50,000 to the claimant for the harassment and inconvenience suffered, along with ₹10,000 towards litigation expenses.* ( *which I'll b donating to army fund itself)* 

This judgment is being viewed as an important step toward safeguarding the dignity and legal rights of members of the armed forces, while also ensuring greater accountability in toll operations.
This is first time such verdict has come from any High Court!
All are requested for wide publicity of judgement so that our soldiers are not forced for same!
Iam just sharing a short video clip of incident that  happened wid me  alongwith last page of judgement!

Incase anyone needs complete copy of judgement please do let me know 🙏

R to @NetramDefence: Shift from Strategic Restraint to Proactive Deterrence

For years, India followed a policy of "Strategic Restraint" to avoid regional escalation. Post-Pahalgam, this was replaced by Calibrated Coercive Capability. This doctrine focuses on:

1. Pre-emptive and Punitive Action: Taking the fight to the source of the threat rather than waiting to defend.

2. Operation Sindoor: A military response that demonstrated India’s willingness to strike deep into hostile territory using precision technology, establishing a new threshold for retaliation.
